input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.7.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.7.3.3
            TITLE: refer to in.10.2 for additional requirements during the noise test

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.7.3.3: Refer to IN.10.2 for additional requirements during the Noise Test
IC.7.3.3 Refer to IN.10.2 for additional requirements during the Noise Test

final_answer: Refer to IN.10.2 for additional requirements during the Noise Test
